title: Inventory malaria and climate data sources for Sub-Saharan Africa
outcome: A dated source inventory that separates health surveillance, climate reanalysis, environmental data, and unusable sources.
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each listed source for URL, date, access status, license, geographic grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five candidate data sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Define sub-national malaria baseline requirements
outcome: A reproducible baseline specification for sub-national malaria incidence with denominator handling, reporting lag documentation, and missingness profile.
expected_artifact: validation.md update with baseline formula and data checks.
validation_method: Replicator reruns the baseline on a sample district and confirms grain, missingness, reporting lag, and denominator behavior.
done_condition: A reviewer can reproduce the baseline calculation and identify every excluded district, month, and known reporting gap.

title: Review rainfall, temperature, and vegetation signal candidates
outcome: A ranked list of candidate climate signals with lead-time assumptions, false-positive profiles, and failure modes.
expected_artifact: task-map.md and validation.md updates with candidate signal tests.
validation_method: Back-test candidate signals against historical data and report false-positive and false-negative behavior at seasonal lead times.
done_condition: No candidate signal is accepted without back-test results, limitations, and replication status.

title: Back-test candidate signals with false-alarm profiling
outcome: A back-test report documenting false-positive rates, false-negative rates, and lead-time degradation for each candidate signal at sub-national scale.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and validation.md updates with back-test results table.
validation_method: Replicator reruns back-test against a withheld validation period and confirms false-alarm metrics within reported tolerance.
done_condition: Back-test results include false-positive rate, false-negative rate, lead-time skill, and specified validation period for every candidate signal.

title: Red-team harmful operational interpretations of malaria early warning
outcome: A failure-mode review that identifies how alerts, risk maps, or seasonal forecasts could mislead district health operations.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every high-risk failure mode has a mitigation or blocks publication, then a second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every operational claim is either blocked, softened to analytic language, or gated behind domain review and replicated red-team review.

title: Check whether outputs match district health decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether the proposed artifact would change any real district health workflow responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk for the output, then a second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: The output has a named user, named decision, explicit non-use cases, and replicated field-reality review before publication.
